title: Task 3: Synthetic-check hook for rotation window
design: Hook a synthetic check that runs every 30s during rotation window; assert zero 5xx. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py.

title: Task 2: Add vault_rotate orchestration module
design: Create src/lib/vault_rotate.py with rotate(name, new_value) that calls vault.rotate_secret + schedules T+5min expiry. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py.

title: Task 1: Add rotate_secret helper to vault.py
design: Extend src/lib/vault.py with rotate_secret(name, new_value) helper that stages a new versioned alias. Files: src/lib/vault.py, tests/lib/test_vault.py. Edge cases: concurrent calls serialize, vault unreachable raises VaultError, empty value rejected.
notes:
Implemented rotate_secret(name, new_value) in src/lib/vault.py with:
- Versioned alias list per name (prior versions preserved for overlap window)
- secret(name) returns newest staged version (falls back to legacy _read_alias if none staged)
- Per-name threading.Lock for concurrent rotate serialization
- VaultError raised if vault unreachable (no partial write — check inside lock)
- ValueError for None / empty new_value
- Test-only helpers: _versions, _expire_to (for future vault_rotate), _reset_for_tests, _set_unreachable

Tests in tests/lib/test_vault.py — 5 new + 1 pre-existing, all pass:
- test_rotate_stages_new_alias
- test_secret_returns_new_after_flip
- test_concurrent_rotate_serializes (50 threads, no lost writes)
- test_vault_unreachable_raises (asserts no partial write)
- test_empty_value_rejected (both '' and None)

pytest output: 6 passed in 0.06s. Ready for review.
